response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo brings solid full-stack engineering breadth spanning roughly 15 years and shows early-stage AI tooling involvement at re:cinq, but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI-powered products at scale, and a track record of advising strategic customers on cloud and AI strategy. The candidate's AI exposure is very recent and limited to MCP tooling rather than platform-level AI strategy, there is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and the resume reflects hands-on senior engineering execution rather than the thought leadership and customer-advisory profile the position requires.
strengths: 15+ years of continuous professional software engineering experience across diverse stacks, satisfying the minimum experience threshold
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership, partially aligning with preferred startup experience
Active knowledge-sharing through public talks and workshops (FOSS4G, TDT) signals some capacity for external influence and community engagement
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (April 2025 onward); no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale prior to current role
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field and no evidence of recognized AI thought leadership, publications, or advisory engagements
Career profile is senior IC full-stack developer, with no indication of Director-level strategic advisory work or influencing cloud/AI roadmaps at an organizational or customer level
